exportArchiveGuideTxt:
Arborito export (.arborito file)

This file is JSON (pretty-printed). Open it in any text editor.

Structure:
- magic / version: archive format id.
- meta: export time and garden name.
- tree: curriculum (map + lessons); lesson bodies are Markdown in each leaf node's "content". Saved versions appear under `tree.releaseSnapshots` only if you checked them when exporting.
- files: INTRO.md and README.md mirror the course intro; EXPORT-GUIDE.txt is this note.

What this file does not include: forum conversations (they remain in the browser or on the network for public trees). It also does not include the browser search index — Arborito rebuilds search from the curriculum after import.

Nothing here is encrypted unless you add your own tools. Re-import: Arborito → Trees → Import (.arborito).
exportDesc: Choose what you want to download.
exportReleaseSnapshotsBody:
Choose which saved versions go inside the file. Anything you leave unchecked is omitted (smaller download).

Close with ✕ if you do not want to export right now.
